requirement_topic.en: Energy Performance — Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for Refrigerators (Tanzania)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效性能——电冰箱最低能效标准（MEPS）（坦桑尼亚）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效性能——電冰箱最低能效標準（MEPS）（坦尚尼亞）

summary.en: Tanzania has been moving, in step with the East African Community (EAC) regional harmonisation of appliance energy efficiency, toward Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for refrigerating appliances. Where a MEPS standard applies, household refrigerators placed on the Tanzanian market must not exceed the maximum annual energy consumption / minimum efficiency thresholds set by the relevant Tanzania Standard (TZS), with the underlying measurement based on the IEC 62552 series (Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods). Energy performance is checked together with safety under the TBS conformity framework, and the Certificate of Conformity (CoC) under the PVoC programme covers the energy requirement for regulated consignments. Exporters should confirm the current applicability, threshold level, and effective date of refrigerator MEPS in Tanzania (and the harmonised EAC standard it draws on) before shipment, as the scope and stringency are being phased in.
summary.zh: 坦桑尼亚正与东非共同体（EAC）区域电器能效协调同步，推进制冷器具的最低能效标准（MEPS）。在MEPS标准适用的情况下，投放坦桑尼亚市场的家用电冰箱不得超过相关坦桑尼亚标准（TZS）设定的最大年耗电量/最低能效门槛，底层测量基于IEC 62552系列（家用制冷器具——特性及试验方法）。能效性能与安全一并在TBS符合性框架下核查，PVoC计划下的符合性证书（CoC）涵盖受管制货物的能效要求。出口商在发货前应确认坦桑尼亚电冰箱MEPS当前的适用性、门槛水平及生效日期（及其所依据的EAC协调标准），因其范围与严格度正在分阶段实施。
summary.zht: 坦尚尼亞正與東非共同體（EAC）區域電器能效協調同步，推進製冷器具的最低能效標準（MEPS）。在MEPS標準適用的情況下，投放坦尚尼亞市場的家用電冰箱不得超過相關坦尚尼亞標準（TZS）設定的最大年耗電量/最低能效門檻，底層測量基於IEC 62552系列（家用製冷器具——特性及試驗方法）。能效性能與安全一併在TBS符合性框架下核查，PVoC計畫下的符合性證書（CoC）涵蓋受管制貨物的能效要求。出口商在發貨前應確認坦尚尼亞電冰箱MEPS當前的適用性、門檻水平及生效日期（及其所依據的EAC協調標準），因其範圍與嚴格度正在分階段實施。

standards_or_laws: TZS adopting IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (measurement basis for MEPS)
East African Community (EAC) harmonised MEPS for refrigerating appliances — regional reference framework
TBS PVoC programme — energy requirement covered within the Certificate of Conformity for regulated consignments

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), which sets energy efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy consumption limits. It is mandatory and enforced by SAMR, with the China Energy Label administered under NDRC/SAMR rules; products must display the China Energy Label before sale. The underlying test methodology aligns with the IEC 62552 series (GB/T 8059-2016). A Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does not automatically equate to meeting any Tanzanian/EAC MEPS threshold, because the threshold levels and label structures differ even where the test method is shared.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性，由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行，中国能效标识依NDRC/SAMR规则管理；产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识。底层测试方法与IEC 62552系列一致（GB/T 8059-2016）。中国1级或2级评定不自动等同于满足任何坦桑尼亚/EAC的MEPS门槛，因为即使共享测试方法，门槛水平和标识结构也存在差异。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性，由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行，中國能效標識依NDRC/SAMR規則管理；產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識。底層測試方法與IEC 62552系列一致（GB/T 8059-2016）。中國1級或2級評定不自動等同於滿足任何坦尚尼亞/EAC的MEPS門檻，因為即使共享測試方法，門檻水平和標識結構也存在差異。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Although both China (GB 12021.2 / GB/T 8059, IEC 62552-aligned) and Tanzania (TZS adopting IEC 62552) share the IEC 62552 measurement basis, two gaps apply: (1) Threshold mismatch — a Chinese energy grade is not directly convertible to a Tanzanian/EAC MEPS pass; the model's measured annual energy consumption must be checked against the specific TZS/EAC MEPS limit, and the EEI/grade boundaries differ. (2) Scope and timing uncertainty — refrigerator MEPS in Tanzania is being phased in under EAC harmonisation, so exporters must confirm whether a mandatory MEPS currently applies to their product type, the threshold level, and the effective date, rather than assuming the EU/EU-style A-G label applies. There is no EPREL-style pre-registration database in Tanzania; conformity is demonstrated through the TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity rather than a separate energy registry, and any energy label format would follow the applicable TZS/EAC label rather than the EU A-G label.
gap.zh: 尽管中国（GB 12021.2/GB/T 8059，与IEC 62552一致）与坦桑尼亚（采用IEC 62552的TZS）共享IEC 62552测量基础，仍存在两项差距：（1）门槛不匹配——中国能效等级不可直接换算为坦桑尼亚/EAC的MEPS合格；须将型号实测年耗电量与具体TZS/EAC MEPS限值核对，且EEI/等级边界不同。（2）范围与时间不确定——坦桑尼亚电冰箱MEPS正在EAC协调下分阶段实施，故出口商须确认其产品类型当前是否适用强制MEPS、门槛水平及生效日期，而非假定适用欧盟或欧盟式A-G标签。坦桑尼亚没有EPREL式的预注册数据库；符合性通过TBS PVoC符合性证书而非单独的能效注册库证明，任何能效标签格式将遵循适用的TZS/EAC标签而非欧盟A-G标签。
gap.zht: 儘管中國（GB 12021.2/GB/T 8059，與IEC 62552一致）與坦尚尼亞（採用IEC 62552的TZS）共享IEC 62552測量基礎，仍存在兩項差距：（1）門檻不匹配——中國能效等級不可直接換算為坦尚尼亞/EAC的MEPS合格；須將型號實測年耗電量與具體TZS/EAC MEPS限值核對，且EEI/等級邊界不同。（2）範圍與時間不確定——坦尚尼亞電冰箱MEPS正在EAC協調下分階段實施，故出口商須確認其產品類型當前是否適用強制MEPS、門檻水平及生效日期，而非假定適用歐盟或歐盟式A-G標籤。坦尚尼亞沒有EPREL式的預登記數據庫；符合性通過TBS PVoC符合性證書而非單獨的能效登記庫證明，任何能效標籤格式將遵循適用的TZS/EAC標籤而非歐盟A-G標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — refrigerator MEPS is being phased in under EAC harmonisation; where a TZS MEPS applies, compliance is required and covered within the TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity. Confirm current scope, threshold, and effective date before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Tanzania is phasing in refrigerator MEPS under EAC regional harmonisation, with measurement based on the IEC 62552 series (the same family as China's GB/T 8059). A Chinese energy grade does not automatically meet a Tanzanian MEPS threshold — the model's measured consumption must be checked against the specific TZS/EAC limit. There is no EPREL-style registry; energy compliance is demonstrated within the TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity. Confirm current applicability, threshold, and effective date before shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 坦桑尼亚正在EAC区域协调下分阶段实施电冰箱MEPS，测量基于IEC 62552系列（与中国GB/T 8059同源）。中国能效等级不自动满足坦桑尼亚MEPS门槛——须将型号实测耗电量与具体TZS/EAC限值核对。无EPREL式注册库；能效符合性在TBS PVoC符合性证书内证明。发货前请确认当前适用性、门槛及生效日期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 坦尚尼亞正在EAC區域協調下分階段實施電冰箱MEPS，測量基於IEC 62552系列（與中國GB/T 8059同源）。中國能效等級不自動滿足坦尚尼亞MEPS門檻——須將型號實測耗電量與具體TZS/EAC限值核對。無EPREL式登記庫；能效符合性在TBS PVoC符合性證書內證明。發貨前請確認當前適用性、門檻及生效日期。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — TBS / TZS Energy Label for Refrigerators (no EPREL-style registry)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——电冰箱的TBS/TZS能效标签（无EPREL式注册库）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——電冰箱的TBS/TZS能效標籤（無EPREL式登記庫）

summary.en: Where an energy-labelling requirement applies to household refrigerators in Tanzania, the product must carry the energy label prescribed by the applicable Tanzania Standard (TZS) / EAC harmonised label, displaying the efficiency class and the rated annual energy consumption derived from IEC 62552 measurement. The label and the energy data form part of the TBS conformity dossier and are verified within the Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) Certificate of Conformity for the consignment. Unlike the EU, Tanzania does not operate an EPREL-style central pre-registration product database; the energy declaration is handled through the TBS standards-conformity / PVoC framework and the physical label on the appliance. The displayed values, units (kWh/annum), and label artwork must follow the TZS/EAC label format rather than the EU A-G label.
summary.zh: 在坦桑尼亚对家用电冰箱适用能效标识要求的情况下，产品须带有适用坦桑尼亚标准（TZS）/EAC协调标签规定的能效标签，标注效率等级及依据IEC 62552测量得出的额定年耗电量。该标签及能效数据构成TBS符合性档案的一部分，并在该批货物的出口前符合性验证（PVoC）符合性证书内核实。与欧盟不同，坦桑尼亚不设EPREL式的中央预注册产品数据库；能效声明通过TBS标准符合性/PVoC框架及器具上的实体标签处理。所示数值、单位（千瓦时/年）及标签图案须遵循TZS/EAC标签格式，而非欧盟A-G标签。
summary.zht: 在坦尚尼亞對家用電冰箱適用能效標識要求的情況下，產品須帶有適用坦尚尼亞標準（TZS）/EAC協調標籤規定的能效標籤，標注效率等級及依據IEC 62552測量得出的額定年耗電量。該標籤及能效數據構成TBS符合性檔案的一部分，並在該批貨物的出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）符合性證書內核實。與歐盟不同，坦尚尼亞不設EPREL式的中央預登記產品數據庫；能效聲明通過TBS標準符合性/PVoC框架及器具上的實體標籤處理。所示數值、單位（千瓦時/年）及標籤圖案須遵循TZS/EAC標籤格式，而非歐盟A-G標籤。

standards_or_laws: TZS / EAC harmonised energy label for refrigerating appliances — label format and displayed parameters
TZS adopting IEC 62552 series — measurement basis for the declared annual energy consumption
TBS PVoC programme — energy label and data verified within the Certificate of Conformity for regulated consignments

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, 2016 revision), displaying a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum) and annual energy consumption, administered by CNIS under NDRC/SAMR. Manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing; there is no EPREL-style pre-registration database. The Chinese CEL label and the Tanzanian/EAC label are structurally different and not cross-comparable without recalculation, even though both ultimately rely on IEC 62552-family test methods.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为中国能效标识（CEL），依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发展改革委/市场监管总局，2016年修订），展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低）及年耗电量，由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级；无EPREL式预注册数据库。中国CEL标识与坦桑尼亚/EAC标签在结构上存在差异，未经重新计算不可直接比较，尽管两者最终都依赖IEC 62552系列的测试方法。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為中國能效標識（CEL），依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發展改革委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂），展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低）及年耗電量，由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級；無EPREL式預登記數據庫。中國CEL標識與坦尚尼亞/EAC標籤在結構上存在差異，未經重新計算不可直接比較，儘管兩者最終都依賴IEC 62552系列的測試方法。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: The label itself differs and the Chinese CEL cannot be reused: (1) Label format — where labelling applies, the appliance must carry the TZS/EAC-format energy label with the locally required efficiency class and kWh/annum value; the Chinese 1-5 CEL label does not satisfy this and must be replaced. (2) No EPREL equivalent — Tanzania has no central energy product registry, so there is no separate pre-registration step as in the EU; instead the energy declaration is folded into the TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity. (3) Value re-derivation — even though both systems use IEC 62552-family methods, the declared class and any threshold must be expressed against the Tanzanian/EAC scale, so the manufacturer must map measured consumption onto the local label rather than copying the Chinese grade. Exporters should confirm whether a mandatory refrigerator energy label is currently in force for their product before shipment.
gap.zh: 标签本身不同，中国CEL不能复用：（1）标签格式——在适用标识的情况下，器具须带有TZS/EAC格式的能效标签，标注当地要求的效率等级及千瓦时/年数值；中国1-5级CEL标识不满足此要求，须予替换。（2）无EPREL对应——坦桑尼亚没有中央能效产品注册库，故不存在欧盟式的单独预注册步骤；能效声明纳入TBS PVoC符合性证书。（3）数值重新换算——尽管两套体系都使用IEC 62552系列方法，所声明的等级及任何门槛须按坦桑尼亚/EAC标尺表达，故制造商须将实测耗电量映射到当地标签，而非照搬中国等级。出口商在发货前应确认其产品当前是否适用强制电冰箱能效标签。
gap.zht: 標籤本身不同，中國CEL不能複用：（1）標籤格式——在適用標識的情況下，器具須帶有TZS/EAC格式的能效標籤，標注當地要求的效率等級及千瓦時/年數值；中國1-5級CEL標識不滿足此要求，須予替換。（2）無EPREL對應——坦尚尼亞沒有中央能效產品登記庫，故不存在歐盟式的單獨預登記步驟；能效聲明納入TBS PVoC符合性證書。（3）數值重新換算——儘管兩套體系都使用IEC 62552系列方法，所聲明的等級及任何門檻須按坦尚尼亞/EAC標尺表達，故製造商須將實測耗電量映射到當地標籤，而非照搬中國等級。出口商在發貨前應確認其產品當前是否適用強制電冰箱能效標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — where a TZS/EAC energy label applies to the product type, the label must be carried and is verified within the TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity; no EPREL-style pre-registration exists. Confirm current applicability before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Where energy labelling applies to refrigerators in Tanzania, the appliance must carry the TZS/EAC-format label (efficiency class + kWh/annum from IEC 62552 measurement), and the energy data is verified within the TBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity. There is no EPREL-style central registry, so there is no separate EU-style pre-registration. The Chinese CEL label does not satisfy the Tanzanian label requirement and must be replaced. Confirm current applicability before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在坦桑尼亚对电冰箱适用能效标识的情况下，器具须带有TZS/EAC格式标签（效率等级+依据IEC 62552测量的千瓦时/年），能效数据在TBS PVoC符合性证书内核实。无EPREL式中央注册库，故无欧盟式单独预注册。中国CEL标识不满足坦桑尼亚标签要求，须予替换。发货前请确认当前适用性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在坦尚尼亞對電冰箱適用能效標識的情況下，器具須帶有TZS/EAC格式標籤（效率等級+依據IEC 62552測量的千瓦時/年），能效數據在TBS PVoC符合性證書內核實。無EPREL式中央登記庫，故無歐盟式單獨預登記。中國CEL標識不滿足坦尚尼亞標籤要求，須予替換。發貨前請確認當前適用性。
